title: Final Stage of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei’s Weeklong Funeral Is Delayed
summary_full: The Iranian authorities said the funeral procession in Mashhad for the former supreme leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, would start late. Hours earlier, the U.S. and Iran traded strikes.
summary_public: The Iranian authorities said the funeral procession in Mashhad for the former supreme leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, would start late. Hours earlier, the U.S. and Iran traded strikes.
